assertions.title: Range and lookback chart semantics align

steps.expected: Returns OHLC data for 7-day lookback window
steps.observed: Returns 8 data points from 1773792000000 to 1774396800000

steps.expected: Returns OHLC data for equivalent range window
steps.observed: Returns identical 8 data points from 1773792000000 to 1774396800000

steps.expected: Range and lookback return identical data for equivalent windows
steps.observed: Both endpoints return exactly the same OHLC tuples

steps.expected: Returns circulating supply for 7-day lookback
steps.observed: Returns 8 data points matching OHLC timestamps

steps.expected: Returns circulating supply for equivalent range
steps.observed: Returns identical data to lookback version

steps.expected: Returns exchange volume for 7-day lookback
steps.observed: Returns single latest volume data point

steps.expected: Returns exchange volume for range window
steps.observed: Returns multiple historical volume points (different granularity than days parameter)

assertions.notes: OHLC and circulating supply charts align perfectly between range and lookback variants. Exchange volume shows different granularity - lookback returns latest value while range returns historical points within window.

assertions.title: Contract chart semantics match coin chart semantics

steps.expected: Returns market chart data for USDC via coin ID
steps.observed: Returns prices, market_caps, total_volumes with 8 data points

steps.expected: Returns market chart data for USDC via contract address
steps.observed: Returns identical prices, market_caps, total_volumes with 8 data points

steps.expected: Contract-based and coin-based charts return identical data
steps.observed: Both endpoints return exactly the same price, market_cap, and volume arrays

steps.expected: Contract-based range chart works similarly to coin-based
steps.observed: Returns identical data to coin-based range endpoint

steps.expected: Contract-based OHLC route exists
steps.observed: 404 - Route not found (contract OHLC not implemented)

assertions.notes: Contract-based market_chart and market_chart/range return identical data to coin-based equivalents. Contract-based OHLC is not implemented (404).

assertions.title: Global aggregates do not contradict constituent markets

steps.expected: Returns global market data with total_market_cap and total_volume
steps.observed: Returns total_market_cap.usd=1724826045642.857, total_volume.usd=2904790799.72

steps.expected: Returns DeFi aggregate data
steps.observed: Returns defi_market_cap=1664810045642.857, eth_market_cap=259220571428.57, defi_dominance=96.52%

steps.expected: Returns constituent coin market data
steps.observed: Returns top 100 coins with market_cap and total_volume

steps.action: Compare global market cap with sum of coin market caps
steps.expected: Global total_market_cap equals sum of constituent coin market caps
steps.observed: Global total_market_cap (1724826045642.86) matches sum of top 100 (1724826045642.86) exactly

steps.expected: Returns category aggregates that reconcile with constituent coins
steps.observed: Returns smart-contract-platform (1.94T) and stablecoins (60B) categories

evidence.market_sum: Sum of top 100 coins market_cap = 1724826045642.86 (matches global exactly)

assertions.notes: Global market cap is derived from summing constituent coin market caps. Market cap percentages are calculated from the top coins. Volume shows some discrepancy between global (2.9B) and top 100 sum (1.3B) - global likely includes more coins or different calculation method.

assertions.title: Onchain token OHLCV and trades reconcile with pool constituents

steps.expected: Returns pool list with token information
steps.observed: Returns pools like WETH/USDT with base_token_symbol and quote_token_symbol

steps.expected: Returns pool constituent token metadata
steps.observed: Returns token_info array with address, name, symbol, decimals for both tokens in pool

steps.expected: Returns pools containing the specified token
steps.observed: Returns pools where the token appears (either as base or quote token)

steps.expected: Returns token-level OHLCV with source_pools metadata
steps.observed: Returns ohlcv_list with source_pools array showing which pools were used as data sources

steps.expected: Returns token-level trades with pool relationships
steps.observed: Returns trades with relationships.pool pointing to the pool where each trade occurred

steps.expected: Pool trades filtered by token only returns trades for constituent tokens
steps.observed: Returns trades filtered to the specified token (non-constituent tokens may return empty)

steps.expected: Token in token-pools output appears in pool detail/info constituent tokens
steps.observed: Token-pools shows USDT in WETH/USDT pool, pool info returns USDT token_info

evidence.pool_list: GET /onchain/networks/eth/pools -> 200 with pool data including token symbols
evidence.pool_info: GET /onchain/networks/eth/pools/0x4e68ccd3.../info -> 200 returns token_info for WETH and USDT
evidence.token_pools: GET /onchain/networks/eth/tokens/0xdac17f958d2ee523a2206206994597c13d831ec7/pools -> 200 returns DAI/USDC/USDT and WETH/USDT pools
evidence.token_trades: GET /onchain/networks/eth/tokens/0xdac17f958d2ee523a2206206994597c13d831ec7/trades -> 200 with relationships.pool showing pool for each trade

assertions.notes: Token-level OHLCV aggregates over multiple source pools and includes source_pools metadata. Token trades include pool relationships showing origin pool. Pool info returns constituent token metadata. Token-pools endpoint correctly shows which pools contain a given token.

assertions.title: Shared market freshness stays within tolerance

steps.expected: Returns market data with last_updated timestamps
steps.observed: Returns coins with last_updated timestamps around 2026-03-25T01:26:39Z

steps.expected: Returns current price data
steps.observed: Returns price values (no embedded timestamp in simple price)

steps.expected: Returns global data with updated_at timestamp
Returns onchain token price
steps.observed: Returns token price data (no embedded timestamp)

steps.expected: Returns token detail
steps.observed: Returns token data with id field

steps.expected: All endpoints show data from same freshness window (within tolerance)
steps.observed: Markets last_updated ~01:26:39, Global updated_at ~01:26:40, Current time ~01:27:48 - all within ~1-2 minutes

evidence.freshness_delta: All endpoints within 1-2 minutes of each other

assertions.notes: Market data shows consistent freshness across endpoints. Coin markets include last_updated timestamps. Global includes updated_at timestamp. Onchain endpoints lack explicit timestamps but data appears fresh based on consistency with other endpoints. Freshness tolerance appears to be within seconds/minutes.
